example_prompt: Add a settings screen with a toggle for dark mode and a text input for the user's name. Include navigation to it from the home screen.

example_response.summary: Added SettingsScreen with dark mode toggle and name input, created Expo Router page, and added navigation button to HomeScreen.
example_response.reasoning: Created a new screen following existing patterns (useTheme, StyleSheet). Used Expo Router for navigation. Added a touch target on the home screen for discoverability.
